title: Claim
description: A structured scientific claim in The Index protocol

subject.description: The subject of the claim (what the claim is about)

predicate.description: The predicate of the claim (the relationship or property being asserted)

object.description: The object of the claim (what is being asserted about the subject)

contributor_id.description: BitRep identity of the contributor who created the claim

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the claim was created

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence supporting or contradicting this claim

justification.description: Textual justification for the claim when evidence_refs is empty

canonical_text.description: Human-readable canonical text of the claim

semantic_representation.description: Machine-readable semantic structure of the claim

status.description: Current epistemic status of the claim

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the claim was first created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the claim was last updated
